div.head: The Chargé in Saudi Arabia (Geier) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 212. Acting MinFonAff today presented urgent joint communication from King to American and British Ministers describing [apparent garble] use of arrival French reinforcements and Beynet’s alleged demands for air and naval bases in addition to assurance French economic and cultural interests. King has already telegraphed de Gaulle, awaits reply.
Arabs cannot remain mere spectators to aggression against these states. King carefully considers Allied position and wants avoid conflict between Arabs and French.

Prince FaisalSaudi Arabian Minister for Foreign Affairs. instructed communicate Dept and Brit representatives Washington. King most urgently asks opinion American, Brit Govts re steps to improve grave situation and implement their promises of Syrian and Lebanese independence and what reply he can give to Levantine pleas for aid.
